Temperature in Kelvin is 87.7875 K
Λ_σ = 0.08670759228835419
Starting from N=0, skipping minimum distance check.

           Starting 1/t GC Wang Landau Simulation        
Be aware that Λ and thus implicitly the mass appears in the metropolis criterion
T* = 0.7500
V = 512.0000 σ³
Box Length L = 8.0000 σ
DeBroglie Λ = 0.0867 σ
Max Density (N/V [σ^-3]): ρ = 0.8789 N
Nmax = 450
Nmin = 0
r_cut = 14.0000 σ
